evals.expected_output: Four subagents dispatched in parallel, findings merged and triaged with patches, STAGED_CHANGES.md written, changes applied via git apply (no commits), type-checker, linter, and formatter gates run, test suite run, final report with LOC delta emitted.
expectations: stinky-output/ directory created before any subagents are launched
static_analysis.py, detect_runner.py, and measure_loc.py are called in Phase 0
dead_code.json, dupes.json, tools.json, exclusions.txt generated in Phase 0
.stinkyignore is checked and loaded if present
Dependency CVE scanner is detected and run in Phase 0 (dep-audit-raw.json)
All four subagents (bugs, simplify, arch, security) are launched simultaneously in Phase 1
Security Auditor receives dep-audit-raw.json as pre-computed data (does NOT run its own scans)
stinky-output/findings-bugs.json exists and contains valid JSON with patch field after Phase 1
stinky-output/findings-simplify.json exists and contains valid JSON with patch field after Phase 1
stinky-output/findings-arch.json exists and contains valid JSON after Phase 1
stinky-output/security-audit.json exists and contains valid JSON after Phase 1
STAGED_CHANGES.md is written before any edits are applied in Phase 2
Triage summary is printed before Phase 3 changes are applied
git diff checkpoint is saved as pre-iter-N.diff before Phase 3 edits
Patches are applied with git apply --check before git apply in Phase 3
Type checker runs after each individual change in Phase 3 (if available)
Second minimizer pass runs on architect-modified files in Phase 3.3
Type-checker gate runs in Phase 4 (if available) before test suite
Linter gate runs in Phase 4 (if available)
Formatter gate runs in Phase 4 (if available)
Test suite is run in Phase 4 and result is recorded
Failed changes are reverted with git apply -R (not git commit/revert)
No git commit is made at any point
Session.json tracks category_stats, quarantine state, and patch_file paths
Final report includes format status and 'review with git diff' note
DONE: signal emitted with iteration count and LOC delta

evals.prompt: This code is getting pretty stinky, can you clean it up?
evals.expected_output: Skill triggered by casual 'stinky' + 'clean up' language; full workflow runs including at least one iteration with changes applied.
expectations: Skill triggers on informal 'stinky' phrasing
.stinkyignore is checked before source file enumeration
Static analysis pre-pass runs and dead code / dupes / tools are detected
Dependency CVE scanner is detected and run if available
Codebase goal is read from README or project manifest before spawning agents
stinky-output/session.json is created with baseline_loc, dead_code_count, dupe_block_count, format_cmd populated
Subagents receive dead_code.json, dupes.json, and dep-audit-raw.json as pre-computed data
At least one change is applied via git apply with --check
STAGED_CHANGES.md is written before edits
Type-check, lint, and format gates run (or noted as unavailable)
No git commit is made
Final LOC is measured
Final report shows starting vs ending LOC, changes-applied count, quarantine state, and format status

expectations: Skill is NOT triggered
